title: Running train aero power system
abstract: Running Train Aero Power System (Figure 2) for generating electricity by harnessing wind energy and method is disclosed. This system generates electricity using wind energy while running a vehicle. This power generating system comprising of two wheels shaped fan attached on both sides of the generator and further connected to grid tie inverter through AC-DC rectifier. This system can be placed on the top of a vehicle and make use of the harnessed energy for the purpose of that particular vehicle. In addition, a domestic, as well as industrial purpose plant making use of a running train exclusively over a permanent circular track, is also disclosed.
claims:
Claims I/We Claim, 1. An electricity generating system using wind power to be placed on the top of any vehicle comprising: at least a generator which should be placed on a wooden plank/non-metallic sheet over a rigid frame; and a wheel-shaped rotor assembly(lOO) attached to the shaft/s (110) of the generator (109) wherein the wheel-shaped rotor assembly having a plurality of spokes(104, 107)in two layers; in which the system is to be further connected to grid tie Inverter through AC-DC Rectifier. 2. The electricity generating system as claimed in claim 1 wherein the wheel-shaped rotor assembly has an inner-circum region(lOl) and an outer circum region(102) which are connectively separated by a rim(106). 3. The electricity generating system as claimed in claim 1 and 2 wherein the wheel-shaped rotor assembly has a plurality of spokes(104) in its inner circum region(lOl), at least and not limited to three in numbers placed equidistantly around the center hub of the wheel in support of the rim(106). 4. The electricity generating system as claimed in claim 1 and 2 wherein the wheel-shaped rotor assembly has a plurality of spokes(107) in its outer circum region(102), at least and not limited to three in numbers placed equidistantly around and in support of the rim(106). 5. The electricity generating system as claimed in claim 1 and 2 wherein the wheel-shaped rotor assembly according to another embodiment has concave shaped spokes at its outer circum region. 6. The electricity generating system as claimed in claim 1 wherein the wheel-shaped rotor assembly according to another embodiment is attached on both sides of the generator through shafts protruding from both sides. 7. The electricity generating system as claimed in claim 2,3 and 4 wherein the rim according to another embodiment is passing through the spokes. 8. The electricity generating system as claimed in claim 1 and 4 wherein the concave side of the spokes should face to the front side of the vehicle while fixing the turbine on the top of the vehicle. 9. An electricity generating system for domestic as well as industrial purpose comprising of multiple numbers of wind turbine generating systems as claimed in claim 1 placed over a 

 train running through a permanent circular track of certain circumference with a particular speed suitable for the said track and sufficient to harness wind energy. 10. A method of generating electricity using wind power by a system as claimed in claim 1 which is to be placed on the top of any vehicle comprising the steps of: placing a generator on a wooden plank/non-metallic sheet over a rigid frame; fixing a wheel-shaped rotor assembly(lOO) to the shaft/s (110) of the generator (109) wherein the wheel-shaped rotor assembly having a plurality of spokes(104, 107)in two layers; connecting the system to grid tie Inverter through AC-DC Rectifier; and generate electricity by moving the vehicle
